name: Nigeria
headline: Nigeria ROTATION CONFIRMATION at 21.9 / Developing — assessed May 14 (21.9 applied). May 16 produced: Tinubu announced VAPP Act review (Violence Against Persons Prohibition) expanding gender-based violence protections — weak positive ACC/EMP forward signal. Concurrent: 30+ killed in gunmen attack on Imo State highway (IPOB-suspected) — security-negative signal. Net: stable at 21.9 pending VAPP implementation details. No reassessment warranted this cycle.

EMP.rationale: Sustained. VAPP review is forward positive signal, not yet implementation; Imo State attack is acute security-negative, both offset within dimension.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. VAPP review announcement is positive regulatory gesture; not yet legislative output. Holding pending implementation evidence.

evidence.summary: Tinubu announced VAPP Act review expanding gender-based violence protections. Weak positive ACC/EMP forward signal — not yet implementation.
30+ killed in gunmen attack on Imo State highway (IPOB-suspected). Security-negative signal.

rationale: Confirm at 21.9 / Developing. Two May 16 signals offset within EMP/ACC dimensions: VAPP review (positive) and Imo State attack (negative). Per scanner recommendation: monitor pending VAPP implementation details and any pattern of Imo-State-type incidents. Math: (2+1.75+2+1.5+2+2+1.75+2)/8 = 15/8 = 1.875 → ((1.875-1)/4)*100 = 21.875 → 21.9.
